allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); funcs=[x for x in data['abi'] if x.get\('type'\)=='function']; [print\(x['name'], [i['name']+':'+i['type'] for i in x.get\('inputs',[]\)], '->', [o.get\('name',''\)+':'+o['type'] for o in x.get\('outputs',[]\)]\) for f in funcs for x in [f]]")
